news.t: Defiance Launches POEL: The First Daily 2X Long ETF for POET Technologies Inc.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long POET ETF (POEL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. POELseeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Poet Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: POET), less fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. POEL was launched on Apr 30, 2026 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Launches POEL: The First Daily 2X Long ETF for POET Technologies Inc.
data.text: MIAMI, May 01, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs today announced the launch of the Defiance Daily Target 2X Long POET ETF (POEL) , expanding its lineup of single-stock leveraged ETFs designed for...
